finding: Cloudflare or verification interstitial blocked two live collection sources after a prior Cloudflare smoke-test stop.
recommendation: Classify these no-submit runs as Cloudflare blocked, not failed submit attempts; keep live collection paused for blocked sources until real job detail pages are visible in the logged-in CDP profile.
proposed_change: Add a weekly audit gate that tags repeated Cloudflare or verification interstitials as a source-level platform blocker before any submit authorization review.
evidence: sessions/2026-05-06-cdp-smoke-test.md: Search collection page returned a Cloudflare interstitial
sessions/2026-05-11-acquisition-os-live-test-2026-05-10T16-05-14-096Z.md: fastapi-python-backend and openai-api-integration stopped on Cloudflare or verification interstitial

finding: Recent inspected packages repeatedly failed submit authorization because expected value, client quality, competition, risk, or fixed-price review gates were not satisfied.
recommendation: Keep submit gates unchanged; classify these no-submit runs as no high-quality opportunity or form gate failed based on the concrete form blockers instead of relaxing thresholds.
proposed_change: Require weekly audit summaries to separate submit-quality blockers from platform blockers and preserve zero-spend status when no submit was attempted.
evidence: sessions/2026-05-10-acquisition-os-live-test-2026-05-10T15-27-23-497Z.md: five inspected packages safe_to_submit false with expected value, competition, client quality, risk, or fixed-price manual-review blockers
data/outcomes.jsonl: monitor outcomes show no submitted packages for the audited period

finding: One live smoke run ended with the runner error budgetValue is not defined before form observations were produced.
recommendation: Classify this run as form gate failed/runtime error; require runner syntax and no-submit smoke validation after runner changes before treating later live results as policy evidence.
proposed_change: Add runtime-error as an explicit weekly blocker subtype so code failures are not mixed with market-quality or Connects blockers.
